name: Sumeet Satish Boob
headline: Enterprise Transformation & Delivery Leader | Program & Portfolio Management | PMP®
summary: Enterprise Transformation & Delivery Leader with 20 years of experience delivering large-scale technology transformation, global engineering leadership, and enterprise program execution across Banking, Healthcare & Life Sciences, Retail, and Telecom. Proven track record of managing multi-million-dollar portfolios, building high-performing global teams, driving operational excellence, and delivering complex digital transformation programs for Fortune 500 clients. Leveraging AI-assisted delivery, engineering productivity, and modern operating models to accelerate business outcomes, delivery excellence, & organizational transformation.
highlights: Directed $12M+ cross-regional portfolios with full delivery ownership and executive stakeholder engagement.
Scaled 60+ FTE global engineering teams across India, Romania, and the U.S.
Spearheaded Agile, SAFe, and DevSecOps transformation initiatives delivering 30%+ productivity gains.
Reduced client escalations by 50% through strengthened governance frameworks.

experience.title: Senior Software Development Manager
responsibilities: Owned end-to-end delivery and transformation of strategic healthcare and retail programs, leading global engineering teams while driving modernization, operational excellence, executive governance, and portfolio growth.
Partnered with executive client stakeholders to shape transformation roadmaps, delivery strategy, and multi-year technology investment priorities.
Drove AI-assisted engineering productivity initiatives using GitHub Copilot and automation accelerators.
Expanded strategic accounts through delivery excellence, executive relationship management, and identification of transformation opportunities.
Directed 60+ FTE global engineering organization delivering $3M+ portfolio (yearly) with full P&L accountability.
Strengthened executive governance cadence across client leadership, reducing escalations by 20%.
Delivered enterprise modernization initiatives across healthcare and retail platforms including CareMetx, Dayforce Tax Automation, and Albertsons Developer Portal.
Awarded Employee of the Quarter twice for exceptional project delivery.

experience.title: AVP, Technology & DevOps Manager
responsibilities: Established globally distributed engineering and DevOps operations across 4 delivery tracks with 18-member cross-functional teams spanning development, DevOps, and NPS functions.
Transformed enterprise liquidity and treasury platform delivery across Java, WebSphere, and SQL-based ecosystems supporting global banking operations.
Standardized DevSecOps governance and compliance initiatives including Blackduck, Checkmarx, Sonar, Contrast, and observability-driven operational controls.
Accelerated end-to-end deployment automation initiatives across lower environments through pre-production, improving release efficiency and reducing operational risk.
Directed modernization initiatives enabling migration from legacy architecture to microservices-based platforms.
Partnered with global stakeholders to strengthen governance cadence, deployment reliability, platform stability, and compliance adherence.
Oversaw security remediation and release governance activities ensuring enterprise compliance standards and audit readiness.
Received Quarterly Gold Award for implementing one-click deployment automation improving deployment efficiency by 25%.

experience.title: Technology Lead
responsibilities: Led managed services delivery for 32 enterprise insurance clients across globally distributed engagement models.
Managed 2 Agile delivery pods comprising developers and QA engineers, overseeing end-to-end software development lifecycle execution.
Acted as Scrum Master and Delivery Lead driving sprint governance, stakeholder communication, and delivery planning.
Delivered modernization initiatives involving migration from legacy platforms to Spring Boot-based microservices architecture.
Contributed to solutioning and technical design for enterprise modernization programs across Java-based ecosystems.
Collaborated directly with client stakeholders with complete ownership of delivery coordination and execution.
Worked onsite for client engagements, strengthening customer collaboration and delivery alignment.
Delivered enterprise implementations across organizations including Home Depot, IBM, Lenovo, and Asurion.
Recognized as Employee of the Month twice for high-impact project execution.

experience.title: Development Lead
responsibilities: Led development teams building mission-critical payment processing modules for Western Union.

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Developed energy products for SunGard clients including British Petroleum (BP).
